name: Terms & Conditions
description: SYNTHETIC. Displayed as collapsible agreement cards, each with its own checkbox: a chequing account agreement (always), plus a credit card agreement (only if the cross-sell offer was accepted).
notes: Reused as-is on both channels — same accordion cards, same per-card checkboxes. Branch additionally requires two e-signatures (esign-client, esign-fa) afterward, since a checkbox alone isn't sufficient consent with a banker present — see docs/rules/channels/branch.md.
